hotels.name: Emerald Bay Resort

hotels.description_en:
Emerald Bay Resort is located in Chokocho village in the south of Pemba. Surrounded by tropical vegetation, this Arabic-styled resort faces a characteristic natural port.

The accommodation will provide you with a balcony and a terrace. Featuring a shower, private bathrooms also come with free toiletries and towels. You can enjoy a sea and a garden view from all the rooms.

Facilities include a restaurant and bar. Emerald Bay Resort can organise trips and excursions as well as airport shuttles. An array of activities can be enjoyed on site or in the surroundings, including hiking, snorkelling and fishing.

Mkoani Port is a 15-minute drive away and Chake Chake Airport can be reached within 40 minutes by car.

Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 8.6 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_it:

Dotate di vista sul mare e sul giardino, tutte le camere presentano un balcone, una terrazza e un bagno privato fornito di doccia, asciugamani e set di cortesia.

L'Emerald Bay Resort sorge a 15 minuti d'auto dal Porto di Mkoani e a meno di 40 minuti di auto dall'Aeroporto di Chake Chake.

hotels.description_en:
The Aiyana Resort and Spa offers accommodation in Verani and features a restaurant. The resort has a year-round outdoor pool and views of the sea, and guests can enjoy a drink at the bar.
Certain rooms have a seating area for your convenience. Rooms are equipped with a private bathroom. Extras include bath robes and slippers.
You will find a 24-hour front desk at the property.
A range of activities are offered in the area, such as snorkeling and diving.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.8 for a two-person trip.

Goditi un servizio di prima classe presso The Aiyana Resort & Spa
Situato a Verani, l'Aiyana Resort and Spa offre un ristorante. Avrete inoltre a disposizione una piscina all'aperto fruibile tutto l'anno, la vista mare e un bar.
